title: Pan Aroma Wild Berries Votive Scented Candles, 4.3cm x 5cm, 130g, Pack of 3, Indoor Use, Home Fragrance and Decoration
features: PACK CONTENTS: Set of 3 votive scented candles with wild berries fragrance, perfect for creating a warm and inviting atmosphere in your home.
FRAGRANCE PROFILE: Wild berries scent combines enticing fruit notes to create a dreamy, exotic aroma that helps eliminate unwanted odours.
DIMENSIONS: Each votive candle measures 4.3 cm in width and 5 cm in height, ideal for compact spaces and decorative displays.
DESIGN FEATURES: Sophisticated votive style candles crafted with quality wax and essential oils for consistent fragrance distribution.
VERSATILE DECOR: Beautiful decorative pieces suitable for mantelpieces, tables, or any living space requiring elegant ambient lighting and fresh scent.
description: Transform your living space with Pan Aroma Wild Berries Votive Scented Candles. This elegant set of three compact candles brings a sophisticated touch to any room whilst filling the air with an enchanting blend of wild berry fragrances. Each votive candle is crafted with premium wax and essential oils, designed to effectively neutralise unwanted odours and create a welcoming atmosphere. Perfect for mantlepieces, coffee tables, or bathroom settings, these decorative candles measure 5 cm in height and 4.3 cm in width, making them ideal for any space where you want to add both ambiance and aroma. The rich berry scent creates an inviting environment that helps refresh your home throughout the burning time. Whether used individually or as a coordinated set, these votive candles serve as both functional home fragrancing and stylish décor pieces that complement any interior design scheme.
